# Copilot — Our Space

Read [`/AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for the canonical agent guide. This repository follows the cross-vendor `AGENTS.md` standard. The full Skill specification is in [`/SKILL.md`](../SKILL.md). Detailed references are in [`/references/`](../references/).

All instructions in `AGENTS.md` apply to GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT in VS Code, and any other Copilot-compatible agent operating in this repository.
